rationale: A system becomes field-true only when its claimed objective survives independent intervention, physical execution, held-out transfer, and settled recovery. Benchmark success alone is insufficient.

portfolio_relationship.Fieldtrue: requires a claimed objective to survive contact with physical reality

current_collision_audit.adjacent_sector_finding: No exact AI, robotics, autonomy, aerospace, research-assurance, PyPI, npm, or GitHub repository match was found.
current_collision_audit.known_unrelated_exact_use: fieldTRUE LLC is an established United States agriculture and farm-box business using fieldtrue.com.

symbol_direction: A measured field trajectory crosses an open verification plane, changes under intervention, and settles on a fixed datum. The geometry communicates evidence, challenge, and recovery without a literal shield.
symbol_constraints: legible as favicon, telemetry glyph, technical-document mark, and spacecraft stencil
